creator: Ville.Eerola@vehome.pp.sci.fi
text:
Hi!

Peter Pentchev writes:
>  The patch in the PR is not quite sufficient, I think; the patch that I had
>  already sent to the maintainer (Ville Eerola <ve@sci.fi>) contains a little
>  tweaking of files/patch-ah (to ./Makefile - the install paths
>  changed a bit). 
>  
>  I'm attaching my version of the patch, just in case; but wouldn't it be
>  better to wait for the port maintainer to react? :)

Once again, thanks for the patch. And as usual, it seems to be a
complete and working one. I have been a little late in reacting to
your mail to me. I think that with your additions, the patch in the PR
is OK to be committed to the repository.


So, any committers reading this, please go ahead...


Regards, Ville

--
